segment.source: Renders a single card with hover and click styling: icon and optional badge in the header, heading and rich-text description in the body, and a fixed arrow call-to-action link in the footer. Use it for: one clickable teaser pointing to a guide, tool, or resource, or a feature highlight that invites a click-through. Prefer 'Content Card' when you need image variants or a custom button label, 'Content Grid' for several cards at once.
